checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Police Clearance or NBI Clearance – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City PNP, B. Moarada Ave., Lipa City or NBI, Olan's Place, Barangay Marawoy, Lipa City

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Barangay Clearance – 1 photocopy
Community Tax Certificate – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: City Treasurer's Office or Respective barangay halls

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Official Receipt – 1 original copy
If not a resident of Lipa City: Endorsement letter from the City or Municipal Mayor
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective Office of the City Mayor

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If food handler: Health permit – 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements to the City Administrator's Office *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive, assess and evaluate the submitted documents; 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Administrative Assistant III, Senior Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the corresponding fee at the City Treasurer's Office *Wait for the Official Receipt that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Lipa residents – P50.00; Non-Lipa residents – P75.00
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Revenue Collection Clerk III (City Treasurer's Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the City Administrator's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Prepare the Mayor's Clearance and endorse to the City Administrator for signature
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Administrative Assistant III, Senior Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

steps.client_step: N/A
steps.agency_action: 3.2. Sign the Mayor's Clearance
steps.person_responsible: City Administrator (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the Mayor's Clearance
steps.agency_action: 4. Record and issue the Mayor's Clearance
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Senior Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

total.fees: Lipa residents – P50.00; Non-Lipa residents – P75.00

external_services.service_name: Application for Special Mayor's Permit for Motorcade/ Recorrida, Flyerring
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Special Mayor's Permit for Motorcade_ Recorrida, Flyerring

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Request letter indicating the date, time of the activity including the route – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the request letter to the person-in-charge *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive the request letter and coordinate the route with the City Public Order and Safety Office for motorcade; 1.2 Endorse the letter to the City Administrator for approval
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Officer IV, Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

steps.client_step: N/A
steps.agency_action: 1.3 Approve the request; 1.4 Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: City Administrator, Administrative Officer IV, Administrative Senior Assistant II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office *Wait for the Official Receipt that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Motorcade - P800.00/day; Recorrida – P800.00/day; Fun run – P1,000.00/day; Flyering – P500.00/day
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Revenue Collection Clerk III (Lipa City Treasurer's Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Administrator's Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Prepare the permit; 3.2. Endorse the permit to City Administrator for signature; 3.3. Sign the permit
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Administrative Senior Assistant II, Administrative Officer V, City Administrator (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the permit
steps.agency_action: 4. Release the permit and file the duplicate copy
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Administrative Senior Assistant II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

total.fees: Motorcade - P800.00/day; Recorrida – P800.00/day; Fun run – P1,000.00/day; Flyering – P500.00/day

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Endorsement Letter for various requests (reclassification, alteration, SUP, Development Permit, Building Permit and PALC)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Endorsement Letter for various requests

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Request letter – 1 original and 1 photocopy
Owner's valid ID – 1 original and 1 photocopy
Barangay clearance – 1 original copy
Community Tax Certificate – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective barangay halls or City Treasurer's Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Tax declaration or tax receipt – 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Requesting party or City Assessor's Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Vicinity map – 1 original and 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Requesting party or City Assessor's Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Building plan – 1 set of plan
Deed of sale, if needed – 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Fill out the application form and submit the complete requirements to the City Administrator's Office *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the requirements, check its completeness and enode/ record the request; coordinate the route with the City Public Order and Safety Office for motorcade; 1.2. Endorse to the City Administrator for approval; 1.3. Sign the endorsement letter and forward to the City Planning and Development Office; 1.4. Prepare Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V, Supervising Administrative Officer V, City Administrator, Planning Officer I, Planning Officer IV, Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the zoning fee at the City Treasurer's Office *Wait for the Official Receipt that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer's Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Planning and Development Office and claim the Zoning Certificate
steps.agency_action: 3. Prepare Zoning Certificate, sign and issue to the client
steps.person_responsible: Economist II, Planning Officer IV, Assistant CPDC, City Planning and Development Coordinator (Lipa City Planning and Development Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Present the Official Receipt to the City Administrator's Office
steps.agency_action: 4. Prepare endorsement letter to the Sangguniang Panlungsod for inclusion in the session's agenda
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V, Supervising Administrative Officer V (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

total.fees: Less than 1 ha: ₱ 410.00; 1 ha or more: ₱ 0.10/sq.m. + 1% certification fee (min ₱ 10.00)

external_services.service_name: Request for Issuance/ Replacement of Lost Vaccination Card
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Issuance_ Replacement of Lost Vaccination Card

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Any valid ID – 1 original and 1 photocopy
Additional requirements for representative: Authorization letter – 1 original and 1 photocopy, Valid ID of representative – 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements to the City Administrator's Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive requirements, check and validate with Electronic Vaccination Record; 1.2 Notify client if record exists; 1.3 Prepare new vaccination card
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Aide II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Receive the new vaccination card
steps.agency_action: 2. Issue the new vaccination card
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Aide II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

external_services.service_name: Request for Updating of Data in Vaccination Cards
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Updating of Data in Vaccination Cards

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Any valid ID of the owner– 1 original and 1 photocopy
Additional requirements for representative: Authorization letter – 1 original and 1 photocopy, Valid ID of representative – 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements to the City Administrator's Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive requirements, check and validate with Electronic Vaccination Record; 1.2 Notify client if record exists; 1.3 Update information and upload into system
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Aide II (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letters of various concerns – 1 original and 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the letter to the person-in-charge
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive, record and attach action slip; 1.2. Endorse to City Administrator; 1.3. Recommend/ approve request
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer IV, Senior Administrative Assistant II, City Administrator

steps.client_step: 2. Wait for the decision/ action
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Notify client of decision; 2.2 Prepare transmittal/ endorsement
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Officer IV (Lipa City Administrator's Office)

external_services.service_name: Attending to Complaints against Defective Weights and Measures at Candido B. Lopez Memorial Public Market
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Attending to Complaints against Defective Weights and Measures at Candido B. Lopez Memorial Public Market
external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Economic Enterprise Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizen, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Purchased commodity

steps.client_step: 1. Report complaint to the person-in-charge
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive and record into the logbook the complaint; 1.2 Weigh the commodity to validate the actual weight; 1.3 If found underweight, advice the complainant to file a written complaint
steps.person_responsible: Market Supervisor I, Market Supervisor IV, Revenue Collection Clerk II, Market Inspector II (LCAdO - Economic Enterprise Division)

steps.client_step: 2. File a written complaint
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Receive the written complaint and order the confiscation of defective weights and measures; 2.2 Confiscate defective weights and measures and undertake appropriate action against the stallholder
steps.person_responsible: Market Inspector II, Market Supervisor I, Local Treasury Operations Officer III (LCAdO - Economic Enterprise Division)

external_services.service_name: Request for Market Certification for Business Permit Application
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Market Certification for Business Permit Application
external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Economic Enterprise Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Lease Contract - 2 original copies
Any valid government ID – 1 photocopy
Official receipt of rental fee – 1 original copy
2x2 picture – 2 copies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the complete requirement/s to the person in charge for assessment and verification
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive the submitted documents and check the completeness; 1.2 Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Market Inspector II (LCAdO - Economic Enterprise Division)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required fees at the Lipa City Treasurer's Extension Office by showing the Order of Payment *Wait for the Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt; 2.1 Prepare Market Certification; 3.2 Sign Market Certification
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Market Inspector II, Market Supervisor IV, Local Treasury Operation Officer III, City Mayor

steps.client_step: 3. Receive Market Certification from the person-in-charge
steps.agency_action: 3.3 Issue Market Certification to the client
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Market Inspector II (LCAdO - Economic Enterprise Division)

external_services.service_name: Request for Permit to Conduct Promotional Activities at Candido B. Lopez Memorial Public Market

external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Economic Enterprise Division

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Request letter for promotional activities - 2 original copies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the letter request to the person-in-charge

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer's Extension Office *Wait for Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Present the official receipt to the CADO-EED
steps.agency_action: 3. Approve request upon presentation of official receipt

steps.client_step: 4. Claim permit for promotional activities
steps.agency_action: 4. Issue permit for promotional activities
steps.person_responsible: Market Supervisor IV (LCAdO - Economic Enterprise Division)

external_services.service_name: Request to Transfer the Rights of Stalls to New Stall Owners - Partnership
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request to Transfer the Rights of Stalls to New Stall Owners - Partnership
external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Economic Enterprise Division
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter request for transfer of rights – 1 original and 2 photocopies
Handwritten letter of the old and new stall owner – 1 original and 2 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Old stall owner and New applicant

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notarized affidavit of transfer – 1 original and 2 photocopies
Any valid government ID with signature – 3 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Old stall owner and New applicant

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the required documents for assessment
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Evaluate documents; 1.2 Forward to City Administrator's Office; 1.3 Approve the request; 1.4 Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Meat Inspector II, Market Supervisor IV, City Administrator, Market Committee

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Lipa City Treasurer's Extension Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Transfer fee - P5,000.00 + 3 months advanced fee
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer's Extension Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and claim market certification of ownership
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive OR, prepare and release certification and update master list
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Market Inspector II (LCAdO - Economic Enterprise Division)

external_services.service_name: Request to Transfer the Rights of Stalls to New Stall Owners - Succession
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request to Transfer the Rights of Stalls to New Stall Owners - Succession
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter requesting for the transfer of rights – 1 original copy and 2 photocopies
If physically incapacitated: Birth certificate – 1 original copy, 2 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Civil Registrar's Office or Requesting party

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If deceased: Notarized Waiver and Death certificate – 1 original copy, 2 photocopies
Any valid government ID of heirs – 3 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Old stall owner and Requesting party

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the required documents for assessment
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive documents; 1.2 Evaluate and forward; 1.3 Approve request; 1.4 Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Meat Inspector II, Market Supervisor IV, City Administrator

steps.client_step: 2. Present Order of Payment and pay at Lipa City Treasurer's Extension Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer's Extension Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and claim certification
steps.agency_action: 3. Prepare and release market certification of ownership and update master list
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Market Inspector II (LCAdO–Economic Enterprise Division)

external_services.service_name: Securing Permit to Construct at Candido B. Lopez Memorial Public Market
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Securing Permit to Construct at Candido B. Lopez Memorial Public Market

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter requesting for a permit to construct – 2 original copies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the letter indicating scope of work *Wait for Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive letter request; 1.2 Inspect and verify; 1.3 Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Market Supervisor IV, Market Inspector II, Market Supervisor I (LCAdO- Economic Enterprise Division)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the corresponding fee at the City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue official receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Present the official receipt to the CADO-EED
steps.agency_action: 3. Prepare permit to construct

external_services.service_name: Availing of Free Access to Internet Services (for computer desktop users/ laptop/ wifi users)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Availing of Free Access to Internet Services (for computer desktop users_ laptop_ wifi users)
external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Library Services Section

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Any valid ID – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Present Identification Card, sign in the attendance logbook
steps.agency_action: 1. Give the logbook, receive Identification Card and usher the client to the computer room
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide III, Administrative Aide IV (LCAdO- Library Services Section)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to the computer room, sanitize hands and go to the assigned computer * if client will use own device, request for wifi/ QR code before proceeding to the reading room
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Assist the library user, if needed; 2.2. Provide Wifi QR code and password to the client for those who will use personal devices
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide III, Administrative Aide IV (LCAdO- Library Services Section)

steps.client_step: 3. Secure the ID and leave the place
steps.agency_action: 3. Return the ID to the user
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (LCAdO- Library Services Section)

total.processing_time: 8 minutes for desktop users; 13 minutes for personal device users

external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Library Services Section

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Any valid identification card – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Send inquiry through text messages, chats and e-mails
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Analyze if the inquiry is ready-reference or long-range reference; 1.2 Look for what the user/ researcher is looking for.
steps.processing_time: Ready-reference: 10 minutes; Long-range: 1 hour and 5 minutes
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V, Administrative Aide IV (LCAdO - Library Services Section)

steps.client_step: 2. Receive the requested data via text message, chat or email
steps.agency_action: 2. Scan the document and send via e-mail, text or chats
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (LCAdO - Library Services Section)

total.processing_time: 25 minutes for ready reference; 1 hour and 20 minutes for long-range reference

external_services.service_name: Availing of Onsite Educational Tour/ Lecture and Storytelling Activity
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Availing of Onsite Educational Tour_ Lecture and Storytelling Activity
external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Library Services Section

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Request letter addressed to the City Mayor – 1 original copy
List of participants – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request addressed to the City Mayor and the list of participants
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive, validate the letter of request for approval, acknowledge receipt of request; 1.2 Schedule the visit and notify the client on the status of their request
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (LCAdO- Library Services Section)

steps.client_step: 2. Come to the library on the given date and time
steps.agency_action: 2. Facilitate educational tour of the library
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Officer V (LCAdO- Library Services Section)

external_services.service_name: Borrowing of Library Books and Other Reading Materials
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Borrowing of Library Books and Other Reading Materials
external_services.office: Lipa City Administrator's Office – Library Services Section

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Any valid identification card – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Register, leave the ID and belongings at the counter and proceed to the bookshelves to choose the books needed
steps.agency_action: 1. Assist the client
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Aide III (LCAdO - Library Services Section)

steps.client_step: 2. After the research, return the borrowed reading materials to the designated area
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive, record and return the books to the shelves
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (LCAdO- Library Services Section)
